narration: What happens when water gets too much fertilizer?
visual_description: Hook visual: What happens when water gets too much fertilizer?
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: What happens when water gets too much fertilizer?
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: What happens when water gets too much fertilizer?

narration: Eutrophication occurs when nutrient runoff boosts algae growth in lakes and rivers.
visual_description: Context visual: Eutrophication occurs when nutrient runoff boosts algae growth in lakes and rivers.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Eutrophication occurs when nutrient runoff boosts algae growth in lakes and rivers.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Eutrophication occurs when nutrient runoff boosts algae growth in lakes and rivers.

narration: But here's the catch: too much algae blocks sunlight and oxygen for other life forms.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But here's the catch: too much algae blocks sunlight and oxygen for other life forms.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But here's the catch: too much algae blocks sunlight and oxygen for other life forms.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But here's the catch: too much algae blocks sunlight and oxygen for other life forms.

narration: This leads to dead zones where fish and plants can’t survive, impacting entire ecosystems.
visual_description: Evidence visual: This leads to dead zones where fish and plants can’t survive, impacting entire ecosystems.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: This leads to dead zones where fish and plants can’t survive, impacting entire ecosystems.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: This leads to dead zones where fish and plants can’t survive, impacting entire ecosystems.

narration: Understanding eutrophication helps us combat water pollution and protect our water bodies.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Understanding eutrophication helps us combat water pollution and protect our water bodies.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Understanding eutrophication helps us combat water pollution and protect our water bodies.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Understanding eutrophication helps us combat water pollution and protect our water bodies.
